mapper.sql: member_id ,login_id ,enc_passwd ,passwd_dt ,passwd_init ,member_nm ,nickname ,gender ,authority_id ,fn_cmm_get_authority_nm(authority_id) as authority_nm ,member_st ,fn_cmm_get_code_nm('MEMBER_ST', member_st) as member_st_nm ,member_st_dt ,member_type ,black_list_begin_day ,black_list_end_day ,black_list_reason ,fn_cmm_get_code_nm('MEMBER_TYPE', member_type) as member_type_nm ,ci ,enc_email ,enc_birthday ,enc_mobile_no ,bizrno ,refresh_token ,kakao_token ,naver_token ,google_token ,last_login_dt ,creator_id ,created_dt ,updater_id ,updated_dt
